file.content:
/** * OnboardingModal Component * * First-time user onboarding experience * - Step 1: Welcome screen with product intro and privacy statement * - Step 2: Features tour (Notes, Tasks, Calendar, Time Tracking) * - Step 3: Setup (display name, default folder, backup reminder) * - Step 4: Completion with CTA to create first note/task */ import { useState } from 'react'; import { Modal } from './Modal'; import { useSettingsStore } from '../stores/useSettingsStore'; import { FileText, CheckSquare, Calendar, Clock, Shield, Sparkles, ArrowRight, ArrowLeft, X } from 'lucide-react'; interface OnboardingModalProps { isOpen: boolean; onClose: () => void; } export function OnboardingModal({ isOpen, onClose }: OnboardingModalProps) { const [currentStep, setCurrentStep] = useState(1); const [displayName, setDisplayName] = useState(''); const setOnboardingComplete = useSettingsStore((state) => state.setOnboardingComplete); const totalSteps = 4; /** * Handle skip tour - mark onboarding complete and close */ const handleSkipTour = () => { setOnboardingComplete(true); onClose(); }; /** * Handle completion - save preferences and close */ const handleComplete = () => { setOnboardingComplete(true); onClose(); }; /** * Navigate to next step */ const handleNext = () => { if (currentStep < totalSteps) { setCurrentStep(currentStep + 1); } }; /** * Navigate to previous step */ const handleBack = () => { if (currentStep > 1) { setCurrentStep(currentStep - 1); } }; /** * Step 1: Welcome */ const renderWelcomeStep = () => (

Welcome to Neuman Brain

Your privacy-first productivity platform

Privacy by Design

All your data stays on your device. No servers, no tracking, no third parties. Your information never leaves your computer unless you choose to export it.

All-in-One Platform

Notes, tasks, calendar, time tracking, and more - unified in one place. No more juggling multiple apps and subscriptions.

); /** * Step 2: Features Tour */ const renderFeaturesTourStep = () => (

Your Productivity Toolkit

Everything you need to stay organized and focused

Notes

Rich text editor with wiki links, backlinks, folders, and powerful search

Tasks

Kanban boards, Gantt charts, subtasks, and recurring tasks for project management

Calendar

Schedule events, import ICS files, and integrate with your task list

Time Tracking

Track work hours, manage projects, and analyze productivity patterns

); /** * Step 3: Setup */ const renderSetupStep = () => (

Quick Setup

Personalize your experience (optional)

setDisplayName(e.target.value)} placeholder="Enter your name" className="w-full px-3 py-2 bg-surface-light dark:bg-surface-dark border border-border-light dark:border-border-dark rounded-lg text-text-light-primary dark:text-text-dark-primary placeholder:text-text-light-disabled dark:placeholder:text-text-dark-disabled focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary-cyan" />

This is just for you - it won't be shared with anyone

Backup Reminder

Your data is stored in your browser. Regular backups ensure you never lose your work.

You can set up automatic backups anytime in Settings → Backup & Sync

); /** * Step 4: Completion */ const renderCompletionStep = () => (

You're All Set!

Ready to start organizing your life

Get Started

You can access all features from the sidebar on the left

); /** * Render current step content */ const renderStepContent = () => { switch (currentStep) { case 1: return renderWelcomeStep(); case 2: return renderFeaturesTourStep(); case 3: return renderSetupStep(); case 4: return renderCompletionStep(); default: return null; } }; return (
{/* Skip button */} {/* Progress indicator */}
{Array.from({ length: totalSteps }).map((_, index) => (
))}
{/* Step content */}
{renderStepContent()}
{/* Navigation buttons */} {currentStep < totalSteps && (
)}
); }

1→/** 2→ * BackupOnboardingModal Component 3→ * 4→ * First-time onboarding modal for backup setup 5→ * - Step 1: Why Backup? 6→ * - Step 2: Choose Cloud Provider 7→ * - Step 3: Platform-Specific Instructions 8→ * - Step 4: Folder Picker (FSA API) 9→ * - Step 5: Reminder Preferences 10→ */ 11→ 12→import { useState } from 'react'; 13→import { Modal } from './Modal'; 14→import { useThemeStore } from '../stores/useThemeStore'; 15→import { autoSaveManager } from '../services/autoSave'; 16→import { requestAutoSaveDirectory } from '../services/brainBackup'; 17→ 18→interface BackupOnboardingModalProps { 19→ isOpen: boolean; 20→ onClose: () => void; 21→} 22→ 23→type CloudProvider = 'icloud' | 'google-drive' | 'onedrive' | 'proton-drive' | 'dropbox' | 'none'; 24→type Platform = 'windows' | 'macos'; 25→type ReminderPreference = 'every-session' | 'in-7-days' | 'never'; 26→ 27→export function BackupOnboardingModal({ isOpen, onClose }: BackupOnboardingModalProps) { 28→ const [currentStep, setCurrentStep] = useState(1); 29→ const [selectedProvider, setSelectedProvider] = useState(null); 30→ const [platform, setPlatform] = useState(() => { 31→ // Detect platform 32→ const userAgent = navigator.userAgent.toLowerCase(); 33→ return userAgent.includes('mac') ? 'macos' : 'windows'; 34→ }); 35→ const [reminderPreference, setReminderPreference] = useState('every-session'); 36→ const [isSelecting, setIsSelecting] = useState(false); 37→ const [error, setError] = useState(null); 38→ 39→ const updateBackupPreferences = useThemeStore((state) => state.updateBackupPreferences); 40→ 41→ const totalSteps = 5; 42→ 43→ /** 44→ * Handle folder selection (Step 4) 45→ */ 46→ const handleSelectFolder = async () => { 47→ setIsSelecting(true); 48→ setError(null); 49→ 50→ try { 51→ const dirHandle = await requestAutoSaveDirectory(); 52→ 53→ // Update preferences 54→ updateBackupPreferences({ 55→ hasBackupFolder: true, 56→ backupFolderPath: dirHandle.name, 57→ autoSaveEnabled: true, 58→ }); 59→ 60→ // Enable auto-save 61→ await autoSaveManager.enableLocal(dirHandle); 62→ 63→ // Move to next step 64→ setCurrentStep(5); 65→ } catch (err) { 66→ if ((err as Error).name === 'AbortError') { 67→ setError('Folder selection cancelled. Please select a folder to continue.'); 68→ } else { 69→ setError(`Error: ${(err as Error).message}`); 70→ } 71→ } finally { 72→ setIsSelecting(false); 73→ } 74→ }; 75→ 76→ /** 77→ * Handle reminder preference save (Step 5) 78→ */ 79→ const handleSaveReminder = () => { 80→ const nextReminderDate = 81→ reminderPreference === 'in-7-days' 82→ ? new Date(Date.now() + 7 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString() 83→ : null; 84→ 85→ updateBackupPreferences({ 86→ reminderPreference, 87→ nextReminderDate, 88→ }); 89→ 90→ onClose(); 91→ }; 92→ 93→ /** 94→ * Cloud provider instructions 95→ */ 96→ const getInstructions = (provider: CloudProvider, platform: Platform) => { 97→ const instructions: Record> = { 98→ icloud: { 99→ windows: { 100→ title: 'iCloud Drive (Windows)', 101→ steps: [ 102→ 'Install iCloud for Windows from the Microsoft Store', 103→ 'Sign in with your Apple ID', 104→ 'Enable "iCloud Drive" in iCloud settings', 105→ 'Open File Explorer and navigate to iCloud Drive', 106→ 'Create a folder named "Neuman Brain Backups" (or any name you prefer)', 107→ 'In the next step, select this folder when prompted', 108→ ], 109→ }, 110→ macos: { 111→ title: 'iCloud Drive (macOS)', 112→ steps: [ 113→ 'Open System Settings → Apple ID → iCloud', 114→ 'Enable "iCloud Drive"', 115→ 'Open Finder and navigate to iCloud Drive (in sidebar)', 116→ 'Create a folder named "Neuman Brain Backups" (or any name you prefer)', 117→ 'In the next step, select this folder when prompted', 118→ ], 119→ }, 120→ }, 121→ 'google-drive': { 122→ windows: { 123→ title: 'Google Drive (Windows)', 124→ steps: [ 125→ 'Install Google Drive for Desktop from google.com/drive/download', 126→ 'Sign in with your Google account', 127→ 'Open File Explorer and navigate to Google Drive (G: drive)', 128→ 'Create a folder named "Neuman Brain Backups" (or any name you prefer)', 129→ 'In the next step, select this folder when prompted', 130→ ], 131→ }, 132→ macos: { 133→ title: 'Google Drive (macOS)', 134→ steps: [ 135→ 'Install Google Drive for Desktop from google.com/drive/download', 136→ 'Sign in with your Google account', 137→ 'Open Finder and navigate to Google Drive', 138→ 'Create a folder named "Neuman Brain Backups" (or any name you prefer)', 139→ 'In the next step, select this folder when prompted', 140→ ], 141→ }, 142→ }, 143→ onedrive: { 144→ windows: { 145→ title: 'OneDrive (Windows)', 146→ steps: [ 147→ 'OneDrive is pre-installed on Windows 10/11', 148→ 'Sign in with your Microsoft account (if not already signed in)', 149→ 'Open File Explorer and navigate to OneDrive', 150→ 'Create a folder named "Neuman Brain Backups" (or any name you prefer)', 151→ 'In the next step, select this folder when prompted', 152→ ], 153→ }, 154→ macos: { 155→ title: 'OneDrive (macOS)', 156→ steps: [ 157→ 'Install OneDrive from the Mac App Store', 158→ 'Sign in with your Microsoft account', 159→ 'Open Finder and navigate to OneDrive', 160→ 'Create a folder named "Neuman Brain Backups" (or any name you prefer)', 161→ 'In the next step, select this folder when prompted', 162→ ], 163→ }, 164→ }, 165→ 'proton-drive': { 166→ windows: { 167→ title: 'Proton Drive (Windows)', 168→ steps: [ 169→ 'Install Proton Drive desktop app from proton.me/drive', 170→ 'Sign in with your Proton account', 171→ 'Open File Explorer and navigate to Proton Drive folder', 172→ 'Create a folder named "Neuman Brain Backups" (or any name you prefer)', 173→ 'In the next step, select this folder when prompted', 174→ ], 175→ }, 176→ macos: { 177→ title: 'Proton Drive (macOS)', 178→ steps: [ 179→ 'Install Proton Drive desktop app from proton.me/drive', 180→ 'Sign in with your Proton account', 181→ 'Open Finder and navigate to Proton Drive folder', 182→ 'Create a folder named "Neuman Brain Backups" (or any name you prefer)', 183→ 'In the next step, select this folder when prompted', 184→ ], 185→ }, 186→ }, 187→ dropbox: { 188→ windows: { 189→ title: 'Dropbox (Windows)', 190→ steps: [ 191→ 'Install Dropbox desktop app from dropbox.com/install', 192→ 'Sign in with your Dropbox account', 193→ 'Open File Explorer and navigate to Dropbox folder', 194→ 'Create a folder named "Neuman Brain Backups" (or any name you prefer)', 195→ 'In the next step, select this folder when prompted', 196→ ], 197→ }, 198→ macos: { 199→ title: 'Dropbox (macOS)', 200→ steps: [ 201→ 'Install Dropbox desktop app from dropbox.com/install', 202→ 'Sign in with your Dropbox account', 203→ 'Open Finder and navigate to Dropbox folder', 204→ 'Create a folder named "Neuman Brain Backups" (or any name you prefer)', 205→ 'In the next step, select this folder when prompted', 206→ ], 207→ }, 208→ }, 209→ none: { 210→ windows: { title: '', steps: [] }, 211→ macos: { title: '', steps: [] }, 212→ }, 213→ }; 214→ 215→ return instructions[provider][platform]; 216→ }; 217→ 218→ /** 219→ * Render current step 220→ */ 221→ const renderStep = () => { 222→ switch (currentStep) { 223→ case 1: 224→ return ( 225→

content.text: Now let me explore the stores and hooks to understand the current backup preference handling:

Design merged onboarding flow with FSA detection
Document implementation plan with file changes
